scope: Privacy Hook v1 — shielded USDC + EURC pools live + Track B fixed-rate swap adapter wired for atomic cross-currency relay. `FxPrivacyEntrypoint.relayCrossCurrency()` is fully operational on Arc; shield USDC, withdraw EURC to a fresh address (or vice versa) in a single tx.

deprecated.reason: Codex round-11 HIGH (Track B): the v1 adapter had no caller gate on swapExactInput, meaning any EOA could drain seed liquidity without transferring sell tokens. v1 was emergency-disabled (setEnabled(USDC,EURC,false) + setEnabled(EURC,USDC,false)), drained, and replaced by v2 at 0x3Fa1AcC8...27f2 which adds authorizedCaller[entrypoint] = true gate.

crossCurrency.scope: Track B (B-fast) — owner-operated fixed-rate market maker. NOT an AMM. Caller-gated: only the privacy entrypoint can invoke swapExactInput (codex round-11 patch). Owner manually updates rates via adapter.setRate(); owner pre-funds liquidity via direct ERC-20 transfers. Drop-in replaced by a production V4 + FxSwapHook adapter via entrypoint.setSwapAdapter(newAdapter) — privacy hook unchanged.

poseidon.note: Both PSE canonical addresses deployed this session via Arachnid CREATE2. Same bytecode as Fuji + mainnet.

roles.rotation: Owner currently holds ASP_POSTMAN. Rotate to relayer EOA via entrypoint.grantRole + revokeRole once the relayer service has a stable key.

notes: Arc Testnet v1 privacy ship — mirrors Fuji shape but uses real Circle EURC as collateral leg (Arc's M1/M2 markets pair USDC<->real EURC, not MockEURC). Self-deployed Morpho Blue at 0x3c9b... (Arc has no canonical Morpho). UUPS proxy ASP_POSTMAN role currently held by deployer; rotate to relayer EOA after the relayer service has a stable key.
